description: OmniRoute release channel taxonomy. Defines all pre-release and stable channels, their stability order, the CI gates each requires before promotion, versioning scheme, and auto-trigger rules. Edited by the release automation; read by the trigger evaluator, channel resolver, and promotion workflows.

nightly.label: Nightly
nightly.description: Automated build from main HEAD. Most primitive/unstable channel. Produced by the 24hr timer or the 5k-LOC-delta trigger. No human approval required.

versionScheme.baseSource: package.json version (patch-level, stripped of any existing prerelease tag)

canary.label: Canary
canary.description: Automated build promoted from nightly when unit + vitest + integration pass. Still highly unstable; used for early smoke testing against real providers.

alpha.label: Alpha
alpha.description: Feature-incomplete or unstable preview. Promoted from canary when E2E + security tests pass. Persists past stable as a rolling alpha track for the next minor/major.

versionScheme.baseSource: next minor or major from package.json (bumped by release manager)
versionScheme.n: monotonically incrementing per base, starting at 1

beta.label: Beta
beta.description: Feature-complete but may have known bugs. Promoted from alpha when resilience + LLM-security gates pass. Persists past stable as a rolling beta track.

versionScheme.baseSource: matches the alpha base (frozen at feature-complete)
versionScheme.n: monotonically incrementing per base, starting at 1

rc.label: Release Candidate
rc.description: Release candidate. Promoted from beta when chaos + fuzz + perf + load gates pass. Candidate for stable promotion.

versionScheme.baseSource: frozen target version (the version that will become stable)
versionScheme.n: monotonically incrementing per base, starting at 1

rc.retention: all RCs for the target version until stable ships

stable.label: Stable
stable.description: Production release. Promoted from RC by explicit human approval (workflow_dispatch). Claims npm @latest and Docker :latest.

versionScheme.baseSource: matches the RC base (the frozen target version)

autoTrigger.description: Automated release build trigger for the most primitive/unstable channel (nightly). Fires when ANY of these conditions are met. The specific channel is then determined by which CI gates pass (see channel resolver).

timeBased.description: Fire if no release (of any channel) has been published in this many hours.

codeDeltaBased.description: Fire if the diff since the last release adds or removes >= this many lines.

schedule.description: Daily at 07:00 UTC — checks time-based and code-delta conditions. The code-delta condition is also checked on every push to main.

build.description: Next.js production build succeeds, dist/server.js exists, pack-artifact clean

release-green.description: Full release-green validation (typecheck, lint, db-rules, docs, unit, vitest, integration, pack-artifact)

resilience.description: Heap-growth gate, chaos fault injection, k6 soak

mutation.description: Stryker mutation testing (9 parallel batches, advisory — expensive)

property.description: fast-check property-based tests (2000 runs, random seed)

chaos.description: Chaos engineering drill (pod kill + latency injection)

cross-platform.description: CLI build + unit tests on ubuntu/macos/windows
